description: Rank all equipment by graph-based criticality using PageRank on the DEPENDS_ON network. Which are the top 10 most critical assets?
Compare PageRank-based criticality scores with the static criticality_score property on Equipment nodes. Where do they disagree?
Identify single points of failure: equipment with high in-degree on DEPENDS_ON that, if removed, would disconnect the dependency graph.
Which Location contains the highest concentration of critical equipment (top quartile by PageRank)? Flag it for redundancy review.
Using weakly connected components on the SHARES_SYSTEM_WITH edges, identify independent system clusters. Which cluster has the highest aggregate criticality?
